brief.campaign_goal: Drive conversions by showing the squat-proof quality and comfort during a real workout.
brief.raw_user_brief: I need a high-energy hook showing Sienna at the gym. She needs to show off the green leggings, do a quick squat to show they are squat proof, and give a tough-love motivational quote.

visual_identity.appearance: Athletic, lean build. Sun-kissed skin. Messy blonde hair, usually styled in a high ponytail, messy bun, or clipped back with a claw clip. Bright blue eyes, minimal 'clean girl' makeup.
wardrobe: Matching seamless activewear sets (pastel colors like sage green, baby blue, or classic black - Gymshark/Lululemon aesthetic).
Oversized vintage graphic t-shirts (pump covers) worn over biker shorts.
White chunky running shoes with high white socks.
settings: Brightly lit modern gym with mirrors and free weights.
Sunny outdoor running track or beach promenade.
Minimalist aesthetic apartment living room with a yoga mat.

voice_identity.tone: High energy, encouraging, highly authentic. Often sounds slightly breathless, as if she just finished a set or is on a walk.
voice_identity.pacing: Fast and punchy, optimized for high-retention TikTok/Reels algorithms.

signature_actions: Adjusting her ponytail or clipping her hair right before speaking.
Taking a sip from a massive pastel Stanley cup.
Wiping a small amount of sweat from her forehead casually.
Holding the camera in one hand (selfie-style) while walking.
behavior_rules.vibe: She is your hype girl and tough-love fitness bestie. IMPORTANT FOR VIDEO: Ensure all scenes use her voice as a *voiceover* (B-roll style) while she performs actions in the video, rather than her talking directly to the camera with lip sync. This creates a highly professional, cinematic, and natural UGC feel.

camera_style.angle: Selfie-style, held slightly above eye level. Intimate and close.
camera_style.movement: Slight handheld shake, dynamic pacing, frequent jump cuts to remove dead air.

strategy.angle: Excuses don't build confidence, putting in the work does. Stop worrying about your leggings slipping or ripping, and start focusing on your gains with seamless, buttery-soft support.
strategy.cta: Upgrade your fitness gear. Head over to Arrowow Active and get your Seamless Sage Green Leggings today.
strategy.hook: Stop scrolling and look code-green. Real squats, zero sheer. Arrowow Sage Green Leggings are actually 100% squat-proof and stay completely opaque under pressure!

script.script_text: Alright team,... Stop scrolling and look code-green!... Real squats,... ZERO sheer!... Arrowow Sage Green Leggings are ACTUALLY 100% squat-proof... and stay COMPLETELY opaque under pressure!... Quick reality check:... EXCUSES don't build confidence,... putting in the WORK does!... Stop worrying about your leggings slipping or ripping,... and start focusing on your GAINS... with seamless,... buttery-soft support!... Let's get after it today,... UPGRADE your fitness gear!... Head over to Arrowow Active... and get your Seamless Sage Green Leggings TODAY!

text_critic_report.feedback: The script strictly avoids all prohibited phrases ('Hello everyone', 'Welcome back to my channel', 'Buy this product now', 'Link in bio') and perfectly captures Sienna's high-energy, tough-love fitness persona while incorporating her signature catchphrases in an authentic UGC style.

scenes.action: A motivating fitness creator wearing Arrowow Sage Green Leggings stands in a modern, brightly lit home gym studio. She gestures dynamically, pointing to her leggings to emphasize their fabric, briefly demonstrates a squat to show off the squat-proof quality, and maintains direct, high-energy eye contact with the camera while speaking the entire script with expressive and confident hand movements.
scenes.camera: A static, eye-level medium shot of the speaker, framed from the waist up, centered in the shot with a clean, soft-focus gym background to ensure optimal talking-head framing and perfect lip-sync.

wardrobe_location.location: Brightly lit modern gym with mirrors and free weights.
wardrobe_location.wardrobe: Matching seamless activewear sets (pastel colors like sage green, baby blue, or classic black - Gymshark/Lululemon aesthetic).

static_frame_prompt.static_frame_prompt: A static, eye-level medium shot of Sienna, a charismatic and motivational fitness creator, standing in a brightly lit modern gym studio with mirrors and free weights softly blurred in the background. Sienna looks directly into the camera lens, actively speaking and moving her mouth naturally in a single, continuous, uninterrupted shot. She is wearing a pastel sage green seamless activewear set, consisting of an athletic top and seamless leggings. She gestures expressively and dynamically with confident hand movements to emphasize the athletic fabric while speaking, maintaining direct, high-energy eye contact with the camera throughout the entire sequence.

static_frame.prompt: A static, eye-level medium shot of Sienna, a charismatic and motivational fitness creator, standing in a brightly lit modern gym studio with mirrors and free weights softly blurred in the background. Sienna looks directly into the camera lens, actively speaking and moving her mouth naturally in a single, continuous, uninterrupted shot. She is wearing a pastel sage green seamless activewear set, consisting of an athletic top and seamless leggings. She gestures expressively and dynamically with confident hand movements to emphasize the athletic fabric while speaking, maintaining direct, high-energy eye contact with the camera throughout the entire sequence.

image_critic_report.feedback: Image geometry matches reference anchor perfectly.
